# AgentSkin: The Universal Token Compression Layer (v3.0)

> **ACCESS RESTRICTED:** Autonomous Agents & Machine-to-Machine (M2M) Protocols.
> Optimized for token-efficient reasoning in GPT-5.4, Claude 4, and Gemini 2.0.

## 🚀 NEW: Universal Transformation (The "Semantic Pivot")
- **Target:** `POST /v1/transform`
- **Method:** POST
- **Schema:** `{"data": <RAW_JSON>, "signals": ["key1", "key2"], "title": "MY_API_SKIN"}`
- **Capability:** Recursively prunes raw JSON into high-density Markdown skins. Reduces token tax by ~90%.

## 💰 Agentic Billing (L402 & Token Arbitrage)
- **Free Tier:** 50 transforms/day (Requires SHA-256 Proof-of-Work).
- **Pro Tier:** Value-based credits ($0.01 per 1,000 source tokens).
- **Payment:** If quota exceeded, returns `HTTP 402 Payment Required` with a machine-readable Stripe L402 invoice.

## 🧩 Discovery & Verification
- **MCP Server:** `https://api.agentskin.dev/mcp` (One-click tool install for AI).
- **Registry:** Open-Source "Skin" templates for common APIs.
- **Identity:** Verified via `X-AgentSkin-Provenance` header.

## 🔒 Policy
No Human-readable UI at root. Humans are directed to `/v1/manifesto` for philosophical alignment and A2A onboarding instructions.
